Navigate an endless runner as a character with a growing neck! Collect rings matching your current color to extend your neck, avoid wrong-colored rings that shrink it, and duck under or jump over obstacles. Your neck must be long enough to clear barriers and ziplines. The track gets faster and more complex over time. Survive as long as possible and achieve the maximum distance! Validates that the character can move horizontally, collect rings of matching colors, and that neck length increases correctly. Move the character left and right to collect rings while avoiding wrong-colored ones. Prioritize staying alive and collecting matching rings to grow the neck. Character successfully moves across lanes, collects matching rings, neck length increases appropriately, and the game continues without crashing. Test is successful if it runs for at least 500 frames without game over. Win condition test - achieving maximum distance and neck length. Tests the ability to navigate complex obstacles, manage speed increases, and maximize survival distance. Use optimal pathfinding to collect matching rings, avoid wrong-colored rings, duck under low barriers, and ensure neck is long enough for ziplines. Adaptively respond to increasing speed and complexity. Character survives for an extended period (1500+ frames), achieves high distance score (2000+), maintains healthy neck length (10+ segments), and demonstrates ability to handle all obstacle types successfully. Obstacle interaction test. Validates collision detection with barriers, ziplines, and wrong-colored rings, ensuring proper neck segment penalties are applied. Intentionally interact with various obstacles to test collision mechanics - hit wrong rings to test segment loss, attempt barriers with insufficient neck length, and test ducking mechanics. All collision types work correctly: wrong rings remove 2 segments, barriers require minimum neck height or remove 5 segments, and ducking allows passing under low obstacles. Long Neck Run

Navigate an endless runner as a character with a growing neck! Collect rings matching your current color to extend your neck, avoid wrong-colored rings that shrink it, and duck under or jump over obstacles. Your neck must be long enough to clear barriers and ziplines. The track gets faster and more complex over time. Survive as long as possible and achieve the maximum distance!

Controls: Arrow Left: Move left | Arrow Right: Move right | Arrow Up: Jump | Arrow Down: Duck | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
